g.title: container.call_number_bucket:owner->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (owner) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: container.call_number_bucket:btype->container.call_number_bucket_type:code
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (btype) REFERENCES container.call_number_bucket_type(code) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: container.call_number_bucket:owning_lib->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (owning_lib) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: container.call_number_bucket_item:bucket->container.call_number_bucket:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (bucket) REFERENCES container.call_number_bucket(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: container.call_number_bucket_note:bucket->container.call_number_bucket:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (bucket) REFERENCES container.call_number_bucket(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
